examples: Little by little, can by can, Mr. Gillie, the trash man, cleans up his town.
Gillie also accepts silver, gold, copper and other precious metals to pay for food.
Gerta and Gillie ran down the sidewalk with some other children in a game of hide-and-seek.
Haringey Council's deputy director of children, Cecilia Hitchen, social worker Maria Ward and team manager Gillie Christou were dismissed in April.
Maria Ward, Peter Connelly's social worker at Haringey Council in north London, and Gillie Christou, her manager, are appealing against their sackings.
